title: Cobblemon Amore
description:
ESP - Mi acercamiento a la experiencia definitiva de cobblemon.

EN - My Approach to the ultimate Cobblemon experience.
body:
![Para Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edacb0c170e6a95ebb65afcf55d20b5b09955ee5.png)

## ESPAÑOL

  Cobblemon Amore es un modpack enfocado en jugar en línea a [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/project/MdwFAVRL) (sin embargo, funciona perfecto en partidas de un solo jugador), ofreciendo una experiencia fresca y renovada a la experiencia clásica de Pokémon en Minecraft. Este modpack tiene diversas adiciónes y cambios al minecraft vanilla, con el fin de que sólo te concentres en ser maestre Pokémon; experimenta los manjares de [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/project/7vxePowz) ¡y mucho más contenido que te servirá en tu aventura!

  Lista de los mods más relevantes:
- Cobblemon
- Farmer's Delight
- Waystones
- Xaero's Minimap y Xaero's Worldmap
- Storage Drawers
- Sophisticated Storage y Sophisticated Backpacks

## ENGLISH
  Cobblemon Amore is a modpack designed for online play in [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/project/MdwFAVRL) (though it works perfectly in single-player mode), offering a fresh and revamped take on the classic Pokémon experience in Minecraft. This modpack includes various additions and changes to vanilla Minecraft, so you can focus solely on becoming a Pokémon Master; experience the delights of [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/project/7vxePowz) and much more content that will help you on your adventure!

  List of the most relevant mods:
- Cobblemon
- Farmer's Delight
- Waystones
- Xaero's Minimap and Xaero's Worldmap
- Storage Drawers
- Sophisticated Storage and Sophisticated Backpacks
